---
name: Alpha feedback
about: Report what worked, what broke, and what felt clumsy during the closed beta.
title: "[alpha] "
labels: ["alpha"]
assignees: []
---

## Environment (required)

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 24H2)
- **Architecture:** (x64, arm64)
- **Node version:** (`node --version`)
- **Claude Code version:** (visible in `/help` or settings)
- **Threadwork install method:** `npm install -g threadwork-cli` or other?

## What worked

(One short paragraph. If everything worked, just say "everything worked".)

## What broke

For each issue, please include:

1. The exact command you ran or the action you took.
2. The output you got, copied verbatim. Use a fenced code block.
3. The output you expected, in one sentence.

A single broken thing is enough; we'd rather have one clear repro than
five vague reports.

## What felt clumsy

(Free-form. UI, docs, error messages, role yaml ergonomics, replay UI,
init flow — anything you wished was different. We genuinely want this
section, not just "all good".)

## Use case

If you got far enough to do real work with Threadwork, describe in 1–2
sentences what you did. We may quote anonymised use cases in the public
launch thread; let us know if you'd prefer not to be quoted.

---

_Thanks for trying this. Feedback is the whole point of the alpha._
